mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workManage( workManageCustomer, workManageProductTypeOne, workManageProductTypeTwo, workManageProductTypeThree, workManageProductTypeFour, workManagePackageNameOne, workManagePackageNameTwo, workManagePackageNameThree, workManagePackageNameFour, workManagePackageFileOne, workManagePackageFileTwo, workManagePackageFileThree, workManagePackageFileFour, workManageEngineer, workManageDivision, workManageRequestDate, workManageCompleteDate, workManageAuthor, workManageTester, workManageProgressStatus, workManageProgress, workManageTestScheduleStart, workManageTestScheduleEnd, workManageOneLine, workManageDetailNote, workManageRegistrant, workManageRegistrationDate ) VALUES( #{workManageCustomerView}, #{workManageProductTypeOneView}, #{workManageProductTypeTwoView}, #{workManageProductTypeThreeView}, #{workManageProductTypeFourView}, #{workManagePackageNameOneView}, #{workManagePackageNameTwoView}, #{workManagePackageNameThreeView}, #{workManagePackageNameFourView}, #{workManagePackageFileOne}, #{workManagePackageFileTwo}, #{workManagePackageFileThree}, #{workManagePackageFileFour}, #{workManageEngineerView}, #{workManageDivisionView}, #{workManageRequestDateView}, #{workManageCompleteDateView}, #{workManageAuthorView}, #{workManageTesterView}, #{workManageProgressStatusView}, #{workManageProgressView}, #{workManageTestScheduleStart}, #{workManageTestScheduleEnd}, #{workManageOneLineView}, #{workManageDetailNoteView}, #{workManageRegistrant}, #{workManageRegistrationDate} );
mapper.update:
UPDATE workManage SET workManageCustomer = #{workManageCustomerView}, workManageProductTypeOne = #{workManageProductTypeOneView}, workManageProductTypeTwo = #{workManageProductTypeTwoView}, workManageProductTypeThree = #{workManageProductTypeThreeView}, workManageProductTypeFour = #{workManageProductTypeFourView}, workManagePackageNameOne = #{workManagePackageNameOneView}, workManagePackageNameTwo = #{workManagePackageNameTwoView}, workManagePackageNameThree = #{workManagePackageNameThreeView}, workManagePackageNameFour = #{workManagePackageNameFourView},
workManagePackageFileOne = #{workManagePackageFileOne},
workManagePackageFileTwo = #{workManagePackageFileTwo},
workManagePackageFileThree = #{workManagePackageFileThree},
workManagePackageFileFour = #{workManagePackageFileFour},
workManageEngineer = #{workManageEngineerView}, workManageDivision = #{workManageDivisionView}, workManageRequestDate = #{workManageRequestDateView}, workManageCompleteDate = #{workManageCompleteDateView}, workManageAuthor = #{workManageAuthorView}, workManageTester = #{workManageTesterView}, workManageProgressStatus = #{workManageProgressStatusView}, workManageProgress = #{workManageProgressView}, workManageTestScheduleStart = #{workManageTestScheduleStart}, workManageTestScheduleEnd = #{workManageTestScheduleEnd}, workManageOneLine = #{workManageOneLineView}, workManageDetailNote = #{workManageDetailNoteView}, workManageModifier = #{workManageModifier}, workManageModifiedDate = #{workManageModifiedDate} WHERE workManageKeyNum = #{workManageKeyNum} ;
